sustainability_note_cn: 以可回收金属作为主体结构，减少长期维护和材料替换成本。
sustainability_note_en: A recyclable metal shell reduces long-term maintenance and replacement cost.

applied_to: 主屏幕保护层 / Main screen protection
sustainability_note_cn: 提升屏幕可读性与耐久性，延长电子模块使用寿命。
sustainability_note_en: Improves readability and durability, extending the life of the screen module.

applied_to: 盲文与触觉信息板 / Braille and tactile information panel
sustainability_note_cn: 触觉信息可单独拆换，避免整机替换。
sustainability_note_en: Tactile information can be replaced independently without replacing the whole totem.

name_cn: 防水金属按键与密封硅胶圈
name_en: Waterproof Metal Buttons with Silicone Gaskets
applied_to: 侧边Audio按钮组 / Side audio button column
sustainability_note_cn: 高频触摸部件可独立检修，降低维护干预强度。
sustainability_note_en: High-use touch components can be serviced independently, reducing maintenance intervention.

applied_to: 顶部辅助能源模块 / Top auxiliary energy module
sustainability_note_cn: 桥西街区存在树荫遮挡，太阳能作为补充电源，而非完全离网供电。
sustainability_note_en: Because Qiaoxi has tree shade, solar power is treated as supplementary rather than fully off-grid.

name_cn: 钢结构底座与可拆卸检修板
name_en: Steel Base with Removable Maintenance Panel
sustainability_note_cn: 以检修板和模块化连接延长设备寿命，适合历史街区微更新。
sustainability_note_en: Maintenance panels and modular connections extend service life and suit historic district micro-renewal.
